task_completion.description: Verify that the 'ExamAnxiety.csv' dataset is loaded into JASP.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The JASP data grid is visible showing the dataset columns (including 'Anxiety'), and the window title or welcome screen indicates 'ExamAnxiety.csv' has been opened.

task_completion.description: Verify that the Continuous Distribution Fit analysis module is open.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The analysis control panel on the left shows 'Continuous Distribution Fit' (accessed via Distributions > Continuous > Fit).

task_completion.description: Verify that the 'Anxiety' variable is selected as the target variable.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The variable 'Anxiety' is placed in the 'Variable' or 'Variables' input box in the Continuous Distribution Fit control panel.

task_completion.description: Verify that the Normal distribution is fitted with parameter estimation.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the analysis options, the 'Normal' distribution is selected (checked or chosen from a list), and the results pane on the right displays estimated parameters for the Normal distribution.

task_completion.description: Verify that the Gamma distribution is fitted with parameter estimation.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the analysis options, the 'Gamma' distribution is selected (checked or chosen from a list), and the results pane on the right displays estimated parameters for the Gamma distribution.

task_completion.description: Verify that the JASP project is saved to the correct path.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Save As' dialog shows the filename 'Anxiety_Distributions.jasp' being saved in the '/home/ga/Documents/JASP/' directory, or the main JASP window title bar displays 'Anxiety_Distributions.jasp'.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the JASP GUI to perform the analysis.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the JASP application interface being actively used (menus, drag-and-drop, clicking checkboxes) rather than terminal commands or scripts.

integrity.description: Verify the results are genuinely generated by JASP.
integrity.visual_evidence: The output pane shows standard JASP formatted tables and plots corresponding to the selected variables and distributions. There is no evidence of a text editor being used to mock the results.

integrity.description: Verify the agent interacted with the file system to save the file correctly.
integrity.visual_evidence: The save dialog or file manager explicitly shows the path '/home/ga/Documents/JASP/' and the correct filename, confirming it wasn't just saved to a default temporary directory.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The dataset is located at '/home/ga/Documents/JASP/ExamAnxiety.csv'. The target variable is 'Anxiety'. The agent must use the 'Distributions > Continuous > Fit' analysis in JASP. The required distributions to fit are 'Normal' and 'Gamma', both with parameter estimation enabled. The final project must be saved as '/home/ga/Documents/JASP/Anxiety_Distributions.jasp'.
